evidence: "I watch a lot of science fiction, but this one wasn't compelling."
"Great science fiction and a great, diverse cast!"
"I enjoyed this film, which contains a kind of time paradox."
"This series seems to be very honest about the activities and angst of the portrayed age group."
"Non-stop action! I can hardly tear my eyes away."
"This film did a good job of showing how non-action heroes reacted to a very dangerous situation. Far from boring."
"Great acting, great writing, great special effects!"
"The writers, directors, and actors are all so committed."
"I love the way humor and serious scares are combined in this series."
"The period sets and costumes were great..."
"I did like the addition of Jensen Ackles as a major character..."
"This series seems to be very honest about the activities and angst of the portrayed age group."

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced science fiction and action genres, often appreciating high production quality and strong performances from favored actors. They value emotional depth and narrative engagement, indicating a preference for stories that resonate on a personal level.
